evals.prompt: How do I set up a digital product in Groove with a payment plan?
evals.expected_output: Step-by-step guidance for creating a digital product in GrooveSell with payment plan pricing, connecting to a payment processor, and testing the checkout.

assertions.name: groovesell_reference
assertions.description: Must reference GrooveSell as the module for product creation and checkout

assertions.name: payment_plan_config
assertions.description: Must explain how to configure payment plan pricing (installments, frequency, duration)

assertions.name: payment_processor
assertions.description: Must mention connecting a payment processor (Stripe, PayPal, etc.) and testing the setup

evals.prompt: I want to set up an automated email sequence in Groove that triggers when someone buys my course. Walk me through it.
evals.expected_output: Guidance for creating a behavior-based automation in GrooveMail triggered by a GrooveSell purchase event, with sequence steps and timing.

assertions.name: groovemail_automation
assertions.description: Must reference GrooveMail automation with purchase as the trigger event

assertions.name: cross_module
assertions.description: Must explain the GrooveSell → GrooveMail connection (native integration, purchase triggers)

assertions.name: sequence_design
assertions.description: Must suggest email sequence structure (welcome, course access, follow-up) with timing between emails

evals.prompt: Can I connect Groove to my Salesforce CRM? I need sale and refund data synced.
evals.expected_output: Guidance on integration options: GrooveSell webhooks (Sale, Refund events) via Zapier or custom webhook handler, since there's no native Groove-Salesforce integration or public API.

assertions.name: no_native_integration
assertions.description: Must note there is no native Groove-Salesforce integration and no public REST API

assertions.name: webhook_events
assertions.description: Must mention GrooveSell webhook events (Sale, Refund, Failed Rebill, Cancellation) as the data source

assertions.name: zapier_or_webhook
assertions.description: Must recommend Zapier or custom webhook handler as the integration method
